subject: [DCAE] release 4.4.2 CM container
commit_message:
[DCAE] release 4.4.2 CM container

Updated K8Splugin 3.8.0 (container policy-lib fix
for base64 encoding in py3)

Change-Id: Icca3aa4af45d92256d395f35cec6fb3ad5c59d2b
Signed-off-by: vv770d <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2671
